scripts.compress:exe: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Get-Command upx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { upx --best --lzma dist/tui-launcher.exe } else { Write-Host 'UPX nao encontrado no PATH. Instale UPX para comprimir o exe.'; exit 1 }"
scripts.exe: npm run build && npm run build:bundle && npm run build:exe && npm run compress:exe
